name: Drop Shadow
description: A soft dark shadow behind the window, cast slightly downward the way a real light would. It follows the frame's rounded corners and leaves the window content untouched. It softens when the window loses focus. Size, offset, colour and strength are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Shadow size
parameters.description: How far the shadow reaches from the edge (px)

parameters.name: Shadow strength
parameters.description: Darkness of the shadow at the window edge

parameters.name: Horizontal offset
parameters.description: Sideways cast of the shadow (px, positive is right)

parameters.name: Vertical offset
parameters.description: Downward cast of the shadow (px, positive is down)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding the shadow follows (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Shadow colour
parameters.description: Colour of the shadow, translucent black by default

parameters.name: Tint with theme background
parameters.description: Tint the shadow with the system background colour (keeping its alpha) so it tracks the theme like a soft ambient glow.
